title: Caspase Activity Assays
author: Kiichi Hirota
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.v7je9kn

steps.title: Cells were seeded into 96-well plates and incubated overnight
steps.instruction: Cells were seeded into 96-well plates and incubated overnight.

steps.title: The following day, cells were treated...
steps.instruction: The following day, cells were treated with reagents for varying lengths of time.

steps.title: 100 μl of Apo-ONE® Caspase-3/7 Reagent...
steps.instruction: 100 μl of Apo-ONE® Caspase-3/7 Reagent was added to each well.

steps.title: Cells were incubated at room temperature for 1 h
steps.instruction: Cells were incubated at room temperature for 1 h.

steps.title: The luminescence of each well was...
steps.instruction: The luminescence of each well was measured using an EnSpire® Multimode Plate Reader (PerkinElmer, Waltham, MA, USA).

steps.title: Caspase activity was then calculated by...
steps.instruction: Caspase activity was then calculated by comparing the levels of luminescence of the treated cells with those of the control cells (incubated without drugs), with the latter defined as 100%. Assays were performed in triplicate at least twice. Data were expressed as mean ± standard deviation (SD).
